name: Meta Pong
detailed_description:
Meta Pong is a 3D first-person action-puzzle game of pong/breakout that combines the classic gameplay of Pong with a twist. After getting rid of all of the blocks, you will have to face the final boss in a 1v1 battle each level. This game includes a vaporware aesthetic, controller accessibility, and original soundtrack, composed by an original soundtrack that blends rock, metal and electronic genres. Move with mouse, arrow keys, WASD or controller to take on what's ahead.

Use your paddle to deflect the ball and hit the bosses goal and to shoot at enemies to maximize your score, while keeping the ball in play. Meta Pong is a fast-paced and addictive game that will test your reflexes and skills. With 75 levels and hours of fun, will you take on the challenge? Can you beat all of the demons and save the world from their evil plans?
